positive: Intricate bioluminescent forest scene composed of stylized celestial elements and deep jungle flora. The composition features interlocking, glowing silhouettes of tropical leaves, cosmic nebulae dust, and geometric astral constellations. Strong emphasis on high contrast black and white line art with vibrant pops of glowing sapphire and emerald green accents. The central focus is a winding, symmetrical arbor structure framed by crystalline, stylized ferns and orbiting crescent moons. Minimalist, high-contrast etching style, perfect for repeat pattern or single apparel graphic. Vector art quality, ethereal, highly detailed, centered composition.
